home.title: Winterfest Togo 2026 — Standing for Jesus
home.hero_eyebrow: Festival of beautiful holidays in Christ
home.hero_subtitle: Three days of praise, dance and communion. The gathering of a generation that refuses to be silent.
home.presentation_p1: WinterFest is a Christian festival dedicated to youth, organized by the Full Gospel Church of God – Togo.
home.presentation_p2: Three days of explosive praise, dance, worship and communion to meet God and leave transformed.
home.presentation_p3: More than an event, it's a movement that inspires a generation to rise up for their faith, their country and their calling in Christ.
home.cta_text: WinterFest Togo is a unique experience of encountering God. Register now to reserve your place.

about.title: About - WinterFest Togo
about.description: Discover the history of WinterFest Togo, its international vision, its values and its team. A youth movement standing for Jesus in Togo.
about.keywords: WinterFest Togo, About, History, Vision, Team, Values, Randall Paris, Full Gospel Church of God
about.og_description: Discover the history of WinterFest Togo, its international vision, its values and its team.
about.twitter_description: Discover the history of WinterFest Togo, its international vision, its values and its team.
about.page_subtitle: Discover our history, our vision and our team
about.origin_p1: WinterFest was born from a simple but powerful vision: to create a space where youth can encounter God authentically and transformatively.
about.origin_p2: Initiated by Randall Paris, WinterFest started as a local gathering before becoming an international movement that touches thousands of young people around the world.
about.origin_p3: In Togo, WinterFest is much more than an event. It's a movement that inspires a generation to rise up for their faith, to engage for their country and to live fully their calling in Christ.
about.vision_p1: WinterFest carries a vision that goes beyond borders. Around the world, thousands of young people gather to celebrate their faith, be trained and sent to impact their generation.
about.vision_p2: This international vision manifests through events in several countries, a connection between churches and a common desire to see youth flourish in their relationship with God.
about.vision_p3: WinterFest Togo is part of this global vision, while being anchored in the Togolese reality to bear lasting fruit in the nation.
about.interview_text: Interview with Randall Paris - coming soon
about.interview_subtitle: Discover the vision of WinterFest's founder.
about.why_exists_p1: WinterFest exists because we believe that every young person has a unique destiny in God. In a world that offers many distractions, we want to offer an alternative: an authentic encounter with the Creator.
about.why_exists_p2: WinterFest exists to answer the questions of this generation, to offer a space for healing, to train leaders and to send transformed young people to their family, their church and their society.
about.why_exists_p3: WinterFest exists because youth is not the future of the Church – it is the Church of today.
about.why_togo_p1: Togo is a young nation, with a dynamic and full-of-potential population. WinterFest in Togo responds to a crying need: to offer this youth a space where they can meet God, be trained and sent.
about.why_togo_p2: WinterFest Togo exists to impact the Togolese nation through its youth. We believe that when young people are transformed, the whole nation is transformed.
about.why_togo_p3: WinterFest in Togo is also a bridge between the international vision and the local reality, a cultural adaptation that touches the hearts of Togolese youth.
about.togo_vision_p1: Our vision for WinterFest Togo is to see a generation of young people standing for Jesus, engaged in their churches, impacting their communities and bearing lasting fruit in the nation.
about.togo_vision_p2: We want WinterFest Togo to be a catalyst for spiritual revival, a place of training for tomorrow's leaders, and a movement that inspires similar initiatives across the country.
about.togo_vision_p3: Our vision is that every young person who participates in WinterFest Togo leaves transformed, equipped and sent to make an eternal difference.
about.interview_responsible_text: Interview with the Togolese leader - coming soon
about.interview_responsible_subtitle: The heart of WinterFest Togo shared by its leader.
about.interview_togo_text: Interview with the Togolese leader - coming soon
about.interview_togo_subtitle: The heart of WinterFest Togo shared by its leader.
about.value_excellence_desc: We commit to doing everything with excellence, for the glory of God.
about.value_authenticity_desc: We value an authentic relationship with God and with each other.
about.value_community_desc: We believe in the power of community and mutual support.
about.value_transformation_desc: We seek personal and collective transformation through the Word of God.
about.objective_1: Train and equip Togolese youth for their calling in Christ
about.objective_2: Create spaces for authentic encounter with God
about.objective_3: Inspire a generation to live their faith boldly
about.objective_4: Connect young people with each other and with local churches
about.objective_5: Impact Togolese society through transformed youth
about.team_leadership_bio: A team dedicated to the vision of WinterFest Togo.
about.team_worship_bio: Musicians and singers passionate about God's presence.
about.team_logistics_bio: Organizers who ensure the smooth running of the event.
about.team_communication_bio: Creatives who communicate the vision of WinterFest.

event.title: 2026 Edition - WinterFest Togo
event.description: WinterFest Togo 2026 - Standing for Jesus Edition. August 20-22, 2026 at the Palais des Congrès in Lomé. Discover the program, guests and all practical information.
event.keywords: WinterFest Togo 2026, 2026 Edition, Program, Guests, Palais des Congrès Lomé, Registration
event.og_description: WinterFest Togo 2026 - Standing for Jesus Edition. August 20-22, 2026 at the Palais des Congrès in Lomé.
event.twitter_description: WinterFest Togo 2026 - Standing for Jesus Edition. August 20-22, 2026 at the Palais des Congrès in Lomé.
event.day1_desc: Opening evening with powerful praise time and first sermon.
event.day2_desc: Day dedicated to training with workshops and practical teachings.
event.day3_desc: Grand finale with consecration time and sending to impact the nation.
event.theme_p1: This year, the call is clear: to stand up.
event.theme_p2: Stand up for your faith, in a world that pushes you to be silent. Stand up for your generation, in a world that underestimates it. Stand up for your life, in a world that trivializes it.
event.theme_p3: Standing for Jesus is not just a theme. It's a posture we choose to adopt together, from August 20 to 22.
event.program_day1_desc: Opening evening with powerful praise time and first sermon.
event.program_day2_desc: Day dedicated to training with workshops and practical teachings.
event.program_day3_desc: Grand finale with consecration time and sending to impact the nation.
event.guests_p1: WinterFest Togo welcomes speakers and artists passionate about God and youth.
event.guests_p2: Eric Assk will return for WinterFest 2026, with other special guests to be announced.
event.guest_eric_bio: Established artist, Eric Assk returns for WinterFest 2026 with his passion for God and musical talent.
event.guest_speaker_bio: More information coming soon on our speakers for the 2026 edition.
event.partners_p1: WinterFest Togo is made possible thanks to the support of our partners and sponsors.
event.partners_p2: To become a partner of WinterFest Togo, contact us at contact@winterfesttogo.org
event.poster_caption: Download and share the official poster of WinterFest Togo 2026.
event.faq_a1: Yes, entry is completely free. However, registration is mandatory to reserve your place.
event.faq_a2: Registration is done via the registration form available on this page. It's quick and free.
event.faq_a3: WinterFest is open to everyone from 16 years old. Minors must be accompanied by an adult.
event.faq_a4: Absolutely! The more we are, the more powerful the experience will be. Invite your friends to register too.
event.faq_a5: Bring your Bible, a notebook to take notes, and above all an open heart to meet God. A water bottle is recommended.
event.accommodation_text: Need accommodation for WinterFest 2026? Fill out the form below to receive our recommendations.
event.registration_text: Entry is free but registration is mandatory to reserve your place. Fill out the form below.
event.cta_text: Entry is free, but registration is mandatory to reserve your place.

testimonies.title: Testimonies - WinterFest Togo
testimonies.description: Discover the testimonies of WinterFest Togo participants. Lives transformed by the power of God.
testimonies.og_description: Discover the testimonies of WinterFest Togo participants.
testimonies.twitter_description: Discover the testimonies of WinterFest Togo participants.
testimonies.page_subtitle: Lives transformed by the power of God
testimonies.testimony_1: WinterFest changed my life. I met God in a new and authentic way.
testimonies.testimony_2: God's presence was so strong during these three days. I left transformed.
testimonies.testimony_3: It was my first time at WinterFest and I didn't know what to expect. But from the first evening, I felt something special was going to happen. The teachings were impactful, the praise was powerful, and the communion with other young people was incredible. I left with a new vision for my life and a burning desire to serve God.
testimonies.testimony_4: WinterFest helped me understand that my youth is not an obstacle for God, but an asset. I learned to stand up for my faith and not be ashamed of the Gospel. Today, I serve in my local church and I see God using my life in incredible ways.
testimonies.testimony_5: I came to WinterFest with a heavy heart and many questions. During these three days, God answered each of my questions in a way I never would have imagined. I received emotional healing and a new peace. WinterFest is not just an event, it's an encounter with God.
testimonies.cta_title: Do you have a testimony to share?
testimonies.cta_text: Your story can inspire others. Contact us to share your experience.

volunteer.title: Become a volunteer - WinterFest Togo
volunteer.description: Join the WinterFest Togo 2026 volunteer team. Several services available: welcome, logistics, technical, communication, choir, prayer and security.
volunteer.keywords: WinterFest Togo, Volunteers, Volunteering, Service, Team
volunteer.og_description: Join the WinterFest Togo 2026 volunteer team.
volunteer.twitter_description: Join the WinterFest Togo 2026 volunteer team.
volunteer.page_subtitle: Join the team and make a difference
volunteer.why_intro: WinterFest could not exist without its dedicated volunteers. By joining the team, you will have the opportunity to:
volunteer.why_1: Serve in an environment of praise and God's presence
volunteer.why_2: Develop your skills and talents in a field that interests you
volunteer.why_3: Meet and collaborate with people sharing the same vision
volunteer.why_4: Contribute to the eternal impact of WinterFest on thousands of lives
volunteer.service_accueil_desc: Welcome participants with warmth and guide them to the different spaces.
volunteer.service_logistique_desc: Manage setup, cleanup and general coordination of the event.
volunteer.service_technique_desc: Assist the technical team for sound, lighting, video and all technical aspects.
volunteer.service_communication_desc: Manage social networks, photography and communication during the event.
volunteer.service_chorale_desc: Join the worship team to lead worship times.
volunteer.service_priere_desc: Cover the event with prayer and intercession.
volunteer.service_securite_desc: Ensure the safety of participants and the smooth running of the event.
volunteer.form_motivation_placeholder: Why do you want to become a volunteer?
